title: AlwaysSprint
description: Always sprint when walking forwards in Minecraft 1.7.10 & 1.8.9.
body:
# AlwaysSprint Always sprint when walking forwards in Minecraft 1.7.10 & 1.8.9.
- Sprint by default when walking forwards, this achieved by holding the sprint keybind on keyboard input. - No need for additional keybinds, just ensure the sprint keybind is binded.
